description:
The HABROMANIA Demo will be out on October 7th, free to play on Steam! HABROMANIA is the Alice in Wonderland Indie game I've been working on for the past two-ish years. Lorddddd it's been a long time coming and I am so excited to share it with y'all. In the meantime, you can check out the steam page or the kickstarter pre-launch page, or stalk my account for more HABRO content. 
.
Song is The Mind Electric by Miracle Musical!
fulltitle: DOCTOR, I CAN'T TELL IF I'M NOT ME
